zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans於大約1092年出生時，她的父親Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins32歲，母親Sophia Polowezki27歲。她於1107年與Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik在烏克蘭Чернігівська областьЧернігівський район結婚。她去世於1124年在俄羅斯享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Cumans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: variant of Coomans, Coopmans and Koopmans , a genitivized occupational name from koopman ‘merchant’.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans was born about 1092, her father, Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins, was 32 and her mother, Sophia Polowezki, was 27. She married Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik in 1107, in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine. She died in 1124, in Russia, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans est née environ 1092, son père, Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sophia Polowezki, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik en 1107, à Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine. Elle est décédée en 1124, à Russie, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans um 1092 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins 32 und ihre Mutter Sophia Polowezki 27. Sie hat 1107 in Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ukraine Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik geheiratet. Sie starb 1124 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Russland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans è nata il circa 1092, sua padre, Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Sophia Polowezki, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik nel 1107, nel Chernihiv, Chernihiv, Ucraina. Morì nel 1124, nel Russia, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.of, Belgorod, Kursk, Russia: ソビエト連邦РоссияКурская губернияベルゴロド ウイエズド
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Aëpovna of the Cumansが約1092年に生まれた時，父Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cuminsは32歳，母Sophia Polowezkiは27歳であった。1107年にウクライナЧернігівська областьЧернігівський районでSvyatoslav Davidovich Rurikと結婚した。彼女は1124年にロシアで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans(이)가 대략 1092년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophia Polowezki(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1107년 우크라이나 Чернігівська область Чернігівський район에서 Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1124년 러시아에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans родилась около 1092 г., её отцу по имени Ahepa Osenovich Prince Of The Cumins было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sophia Polowezki, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Svyatoslav Davidovich Rurik в 1107 г. в местности Черниговский район, Черниговская область, Украина. Она умерла в 1124 г. в местности Россия в возрасте 33 лет.
